seoTitle: Stewarts Brook vs Stewarts River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stewarts Brook and Stewarts River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stewarts Brook vs Stewarts River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stewarts Brook and Stewarts River.
heading: Stewarts Brook vs Stewarts River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stewarts Brook, New South Wales and Stewarts River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stewarts Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Stewarts River (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stewarts Brook or Stewarts River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stewarts Brook has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Stewarts River scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stewarts Brook scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Stewarts River scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stewarts Brook or Stewarts River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stewarts Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
